title: Сraftable totem by Bester_play
description: Adds a custom Totem of Undying recipe using diamonds, emeralds, and gold
body:
This datapack adds the crafting of the totem of undying
Items for crafting:
emerald 1x, diamond 1x, gold block 4x.

![Craft of the totem of undying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad698c07d788a0c9fe54d26ce6786112e15e85d8.png)
